records.cause: declared count was not checked before indexing values
records.fix: validate the declared count before solving

records.cause: output code assumed at least one unique value
records.fix: emit a zero count and an empty second line

records.cause: nodes were marked visited after removal instead of before enqueue
records.fix: mark each node when it enters the BFS frontier

records.cause: every query scanned the complete list
records.fix: build one set and perform one lookup per query

records.counterexample: checkpoint reached with no invariant and no passing boundary case
records.smaller_probe: before checkpoint the policy keeps working
records.cause: the session had no explicit stop rule at the checkpoint
records.fix: switch only when checkpoint is reached without either progress signal
